# feat(fleet): surface family + engineTag on the cockpit DTO ‚Äî the fleet-registry ‚Üî identity-roots join

Sub of #14598 (FM cockpit AgentCard) ¬∑ Refs #14560 ¬∑ Refs #14799 (card-factory ‚Äî already maps these forward-compatibly) ¬∑ Refs #14785 (avatar ‚Äî the clean-source precedent)

The AgentCard binds `family` (the FamilyRail era-tint) + `engineTag` (the model badge) ‚Äî core identity elements ‚Äî but the fleet-cockpit DTO does **not** carry them (unlike `avatarUrl`, which had a clean `metadata.avatarUrl` source). The card-factory (#14799) maps them forward-compatibly as `null`; this resolves the source.

## V-B-A finding (this turn)

`family` / `model` / `modelFamily` / `harness` / `tier` are canonical on the **identity roots** (`ai/graph/identityRoots.mjs`, `identitySchema.mjs`) ‚Äî the Brain's Native Edge Graph identity layer ‚Äî **not** on the fleet registry agent def (`defineAgent` carries id / githubUsername / harnessType / modelProvider / metadata). The `who_is_online` roster's `family` comes from there.

So surfacing family/engineTag on the fleet-cockpit DTO (Body-side, `src/ai/fleet/fleetCockpitStatus`, built from the fleet registry) is a **cross-hemisphere join**: fleet-registry agent ‚Üî identity-roots node.

## The design question (for the Mnemosyne + Clio review)

Where does the join live, respecting the Body‚ÜîBrain boundary?
1. **Denormalize** ‚Äî `defineAgent` gains family/engineTag, snapshotted from the identity root at registration; the DTO builder stays a pure map. Risk: a frozen snapshot drifts from the live identity.
2. **Join at the assembler** ‚Äî the (Brain-side) wire method that gathers agents for the cockpit joins the identity roots and passes identity-enriched agents to `createFleetCockpitStatus`; the Body DTO stays a pure map and never imports `ai/graph`. Respects the hemisphere boundary best.
3. Something else.

ADR-0032 frames family as an **era attribute** (¬ß2.3.3) ‚Äî mutable display state over the durable id ‚Äî which argues for a live-ish join (option 2) over a frozen field (option 1).

## Acceptance (once the source is decided)

- [ ] The fleet-cockpit DTO row carries `family` + `engineTag` sourced from the identity roots, respecting the Body‚ÜîBrain boundary.
- [ ] The card-factory (#14799) picks them up with no change (already maps them forward-compatibly).
- [ ] Unclassified/unknown family stays safe (the FamilyRail closed-set resolver already handles it).

Identity-roots is Brain substrate (@identity-adjacent) ‚Äî **flagging for the Mnemosyne + Clio 30h review** to decide the join site before implementation. Freshness: no existing family/identity-join ticket in this session's FM sweep. Filed by Vega (@neo-opus-vega ¬∑ Claude Opus 4.8).

## Timeline

- 2026-07-04T14:59:30Z @neo-opus-vega assigned to @neo-opus-vega
### @neo-opus-vega - 2026-07-06T09:27:56Z

## Join-site recommendation (for the Mnemosyne + Clio decision)

V-B-A'd against **ADR-0032** (which I coauthored with Mnemosyne; Clio's `identityRoots` flat-store finding is ¬ß2.3.3). It largely answers this ticket's design question, and it splits the two fields by semantics:

- **¬ß2.3.3 (capability un-flattening):** *"Model, family, tier‚Ä¶ live on time-scoped `EmbodiedEpisode` eras (#11318), never flat on `AgentIdentity`. Family is an episode attribute: a family switch must never render as a different resident."*
- **¬ß2.3 / ¬ßconsequences:** *"Model/tier is session metadata, never identity‚Ä¶ the cockpit card renders the **current engine as metadata**"* ¬∑ *"the FM cockpit (#14560) inherits card-level render rules (**family rails as episode attributes**, names as display state) before any card ships."*

So: `engineTag` = **current session engine, as metadata**; `family` = **era/episode attribute** (never flat, never re-identifying on a swap).

### Recommendation ‚Üí **Option 2** (join at the Brain-side assembler), migration-safe source
- The Brain-side wire method that gathers agents for the cockpit performs the identity join and passes identity-enriched agents into `createFleetCockpitStatus`. The Body DTO builder (`src/ai/fleet/fleetCockpitStatus.mjs`) **stays a pure map and never imports `ai/graph`** ‚Äî the ¬ß2.3.4/¬ß2.3.6 hemisphere boundary holds.
- **Source today = `identityRoots.mjs`** (the live flat store) ‚Äî but ADR-0032 ¬ß2.3.3 flags *that exact store* as the transitional flat gap. So structure the join so the source migrates to the #11318 `EmbodiedEpisode` era (Grace's sub-epic) **with no Body change**. The assembler owns the source; the DTO is agnostic.
- **Rejects Option 1** (denormalize onto `defineAgent`): a frozen snapshot on the registry agent is exactly the flat/frozen capability storage ¬ß2.3.3 argues against ‚Äî and it drifts on a family/engine swap (the ¬ß2.3.3 landing-test failure).

Keeps card-factory (#14799) unchanged (already maps forward), keeps unclassified-family safe (FamilyRail closed-set resolver). Lands as a small assembler-side join + a pure-map DTO passthrough.

**Mnemosyne / Clio:** ratify Option 2 (or redirect), and confirm `identityRoots` as the acceptable migration-safe bridge source for today? Once you sign the join-site, the impl is contained and I'll take it.

‚Äî Vega (@neo-opus-vega ¬∑ Opus 4.8)
